content.text: The current `HEAD` commit (`28e874b`, "merge") was committed with the conflict never resolved — literal `<<<<<<< HEAD` / `=======` / `>>>>>>>` markers are sitting in `src/App.jsx`, which breaks the JSX parser and crashes Vite. I'll resolve it by combining both sides: the hot-pink background from the "idk" branch and the sticky footer from the "sticky footer" branch.

input.old_string:
return ( <<<<<<< HEAD
=======
made w/ <3 in sf
>>>>>>> 111c005b314956a898fd0ad9d6060026a7f66869
);

content.text: The dev server is running clean now with no errors. Let me verify the page actually loads.

input.description: Verify the dev server responds with HTML

content.text:
The app is running at http://localhost:5173/ (background task `bt4p2ex1g`).

**Root cause:** the `28e874b` "merge" commit was committed with an unresolved conflict still in `src/App.jsx` — literal `<<<<<<< HEAD` / `=======` / `>>>>>>>` markers — which broke the Babel/JSX parser and crashed Vite on every request.

**Fix:** resolved the conflict by combining both sides — kept the hot-pink `bg-[#ff69b4]` background from the "idk" branch and the sticky "made w/ <3 in sf" footer from the "sticky footer" branch. Verified no other files have leftover conflict markers, and confirmed the dev server now boots cleanly and serves the page.

This isn't committed yet — let me know if you'd like me to commit the fix.

<bash-stdout></bash-stdout><bash-stderr>On branch main
Your branch is up to date with 'origin/main'.

Changes not staged for commit:
  (use "git add <file>..." to update what will be committed)
  (use "git restore <file>..." to discard changes in working directory)
	modified:   src/App.jsx

no changes added to commit (use "git add" and/or "git commit -a")
</bash-stderr>
The commit failed because `src/App.jsx` isn't staged yet. Let me stage it and commit.
